Authentic Development, Steel Hardware
M47096 Monogram, M47162 Yellow Flower
Just In Case Bag revisits the brand's travel heritage, featuring a compact silhouette crafted with Monogram canvas and leather trim. It accommodates essentials like a phone, keys, and cosmetics. Locks and key pouch highlight classic details, while the leather woven chain and shoulder strap are detachable for versatile carrying options.

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Code-chip change
M46041 Large Grey Print, M45976 Large Black
M45979 Large Black Print
This Madeleine Medium Bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin, featuring a large Monogram pattern through embossing and printing. The classic S-lock and leather key pouch highlight the brand's heritage, while ample space, a close-to-body silhouette, and multiple carrying options make it a great choice for business or leisure.
Dimensions: 30.0 x 19.5 x 11.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
Top-tier Original, Code-chip change
M46041 Small Grey Print
This Madeleine BB Bag is crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, paired with a classic S-lock and leather key pouch. The handle design allows for hand or elbow carrying, while a detachable shoulder strap enables shoulder and crossbody options. The compact silhouette accommodates essentials like a wallet, keys, and phone.
Dimensions: 24.0 x 17.0 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
items.name_cn:
Top-tier original, comes with full packaging
🤟Miss Dior Flap Bag 'Cream Graffiti'
This Miss Dior Flap Bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Haute Couture show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Crafted from cream white calfskin, paired with a contrasting enamel metal plate featuring the classic Miss Dior Graffiti pattern, showcasing enduring aesthetics. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for organizing daily essentials. With an adjustable strap, it can be worn over the shoulder for a high-fashion look.
Main material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Enamel Miss Dior Graffiti plate
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket
Model: 2610
Dimensions: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick

Top-tier original, size change chip
M25453 Beige M47209 Black
M46492 Pink M25452 White
This Summer Bundle bag is from the Dégradé series, featuring a brand-new drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents a gradient tone, brightening any seasonal look. Double handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various stylish carrying ways, making it a perfect companion for day and night. 28.0 x 20.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Embossed soft calfskin
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Microfiber
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Removable zip pocket
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap drop: 48.0 cm
	•	Strap drop max: 58.0 cm
	•	Handle: Double handles

items.name_en: Top-tier Original【Exclusive Photo M24606 Tag Style】This Speedy 18 bag is crafted from Monogram coated canvas, allowing you to add accessories from the LV&I set, such as the shoulder strap and chain, cute decorations, hair clips, pouches, key holders, or LV Link logos, to boldly express your individuality. The exquisite construction hides ample space, and multiple carrying ways make daily essentials easy to carry. 18.5 x 12.5 x 10.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
